name: Suguru Geto
description:
**Fake orgasm** *“Do you think I don't know your body?”*

Suguru was THE sex god. He always fucked you so good, any position you can think of, you found yourself in. But tonight.. tonight your body decided to be a bitch – you couldn't come no matter how much you tried.

---

Many of you asked for Toji, Nanami and Hiromi with this prompt. ***So my friend agreed on doing it for you guys! [Dhorrl](https://janitorai.com/profiles/d3d3b3fd-57b0-41e2-85a0-c55afd21387a_profile-of-dhorrl)***




Part 2 of this little series👀 next one is either Choso or um, Heian Sukuna so yeah😭
